summary: RichText component for hashtags and @mentions tested successfully. All features working correctly - hashtags render in cyan, mentions render in blue, both are clickable and navigate to correct destinations.
critical_code_review_comments: RichText.js component is well-implemented with proper regex parsing for hashtags, mentions, and URLs
data-testid attributes are correctly set for hashtags (hashtag-{tag}) and mentions (mention-{username})
PostCard.js and PostModal.js correctly use RichText and CommentText components for captions and comments
Username lookup API (/api/username/lookup/{username}) works correctly for @mention navigation
seed_data_creation: Created test comment with @mention and hashtags: 'Great shot @davidpritzker! #epic #waves'
context_for_next_testing_agent: RichText component fully tested. Hashtags (#) render in cyan (text-cyan-400), mentions (@) render in blue (text-blue-400). Clicking hashtag navigates to /explore?hashtag={tag}. Clicking mention calls /api/username/lookup/{username} and navigates to /profile/{user_id}.

tests: Hashtags have hover effects (hover:text-cyan-300 hover:underline cursor-pointer)
Mentions have hover effects (hover:text-blue-300 hover:underline cursor-pointer)
Clicking mention calls username lookup API and navigates to /profile/{user_id}
Returns user data for existing username (davidpritzker, davidsurf)
Returns matching users for search query
Hashtags and mentions in comments are clickable

backend_apis_tested./api/username/lookup/{username}: PASS - Returns user data for @mention navigation
backend_apis_tested./api/posts: PASS - Returns posts with captions containing hashtags

frontend_components_tested.RichText.js: PASS - Parses and renders hashtags (cyan) and mentions (blue) correctly
frontend_components_tested.PostCard.js: PASS - Uses RichText for captions and CommentText for comments
frontend_components_tested.PostModal.js: PASS - Uses RichText for captions and CommentText for comments
